title: Connect-Four-AI
description: An intelligent Connect Four game powered by advanced AI algorithms, including Deep Reinforcement Learning, AlphaZero, and Meta-Learning, designed to challenge and evolve against human opponents.
summary: 该项目实现了一个智能四子棋游戏，集成了深度强化学习、AlphaZero和元学习等先进AI算法，旨在通过与人类对弈不断挑战和进化。
